evalAfter: (async()=>{const w=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const b=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(b)b.click();await w(2500);try{MOS.nav('facturacion')}catch(e){}await w(3000);const rows=[...document.querySelectorAll('#facItems .fac-itemrow')];const r={vw:innerWidth};if(rows.length){const row=rows[0];const rr=row.getBoundingClientRect();r.rowRight=Math.round(rr.right);r.rowLeft=Math.round(rr.left);r.rowW=Math.round(rr.width);const kids=[...row.children].map(k=>{const kr=k.getBoundingClientRect();return {tag:k.tagName.toLowerCase(),right:Math.round(kr.right),w:Math.round(kr.width),cutoff:kr.right>innerWidth+1};});r.kids=kids;r.anyCut=kids.some(k=>k.cutoff);r.gridCols=getComputedStyle(row).gridTemplateColumns;}else{r.noRows=true}return r;})()
